nasb.text: You came only yesterday, and shall I today make you wander with us, while I go where I will? Return and take back your brothers; mercy and truth be with you.”

esv.text: You came only yesterday, and shall I today make you wander about with us, since I go I know not where? Go back and take your brothers with you, and may the Lord show steadfast love and faithfulness to you.”

cnv.text: 你昨天才來，我怎可以今天就讓你與我們一同流浪呢？現在我還不知道我要到哪裡去。你回去吧！帶著你的兄弟一同回去吧！願耶和華的慈愛和信實與你同在。”

ccb.text: 你刚来不久，我怎么可以叫你跟我们一同四处飘流呢？我甚至不知道往何处去。你还是和你的弟兄回去吧，愿耶和华以慈爱和信实待你！”
